name: woodev_framework
description: Woodev Plugin Framework — build toolchain for the React-powered license management admin UI.

scripts.build: wp-scripts build ./src/license-page/index.js --output-path=woodev/assets/build/license-page && wp-scripts build ./src/plugins-page/index.js --output-path=woodev/assets/build/plugins-page && wp-scripts build ./src/setup-wizard/index.js --output-path=woodev/assets/build/setup-wizard && wp-scripts build ./src/settings-page/index.js --output-path=woodev/assets/build/settings-page
